# isFunctionValue()

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function isFunctionValue(value: unknown): value is (args: unknown[]) => unknown;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts:127](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts#L127)

Type guard that narrows an `unknown` value to a function signature.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description         |
| --------- | --------- | ------------------- |
| `value`   | `unknown` | The value to check. |

## Returns

`value is (args: unknown[]) => unknown`

`true` if `value` is a function; the compiler narrows the
type accordingly.

## Remarks

Uses a `typeof` check and returns a type predicate so callers can
safely invoke the value without additional casting.  Currently
consumed by the stdio transport spec to verify that
`startStdioServer` is a callable export.
